question: For the illustrative example, we have established that when $\bar{x}=173$ (pounds), $P=0.27$. This $P$-value indicates that 173 is not significantly different from 170 at conventional levels of $\alpha$ (retain $H_0$ ). In contrast, when $\bar{x}=185, P=0.0013$, thus providing highly significant evidence against $H_0$ (reject $H_0$ )
